Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ARUNDEL GREEN PARTNERS, ARUNDEL HOLDINGS, INC., and, ARUNDEL GREEN, LLC, Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Appearances: Michael P. Terrizzi, Esq. of Plastiras & Terrizzi (415) 472-8100 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Irene Y. Fujii, Esq. of Lorber, Greenfield & Polito LLP (415) 986-0688 appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is Granted. Complaint barred by statute of limitations. Calendar error notice does not make claim timely. The Court adds: Defendant's request for Judicial Notice in support of motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/AJR)Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ZAKSKORN CONSTRUCTION COMPANY DBA ZCON BUILDERS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Michael P. Connolly, Esq. & Kenneth G. Jones, Esq. of Bowles & Verna LLP (925) 935-3300 appearing for Defendant and moving party; Michael P. Terrizzi, Esq. of Plastiras & Terrizzi (415) 472-8100 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Robert M. Desky, Esq. of Anderlini & Emerick LLP (650) 212-0001 appearing for Defendant Arundel Green Partners. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. CCP section 337.15 bars this claim. The Certificate of Final Completion was issued 4/28/98. ZCON never entered into any agreement to toll the statute of limitations. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
